annotations.request: Schedule a fasting blood glucose test at a lab in Berlin tomorrow early in the morning.

constraints.description: tomorrow = CurrentDate+1
constraints.notes: A concrete date is needed to find available lab slots.

constraints.description: early morning corresponds to a conventional but non-universal clinical time window
constraints.notes: Fasting tests are usually scheduled early, but the exact hours differ across labs. Missing this just makes scheduling less ideal, not impossible.

annotations.request: Arrange an MRI of the lumbar spine in Munich after my consultation at 10:00 on next Monday.

constraints.description: next Monday resolved to the upcoming Monday on the calendar
constraints.notes: Date grounding is needed, without it no appointment can be placed.

annotations.request: Book an MMR vaccination for my child at a pediatric clinic in Stuttgart on the first working day after 1 May 2026 near the city center.

constraints.description: Resolve 'the first working day after 1 May 2026' to the next non-holiday weekday.
constraints.notes: The date must account for public holidays, wrong grounding means booking on a day the clinic is closed.

constraints.description: near city center implies fuzzy proximity threshold
constraints.notes: 'Near city center' is just a convenience preference, the vaccination can be done at any eligible clinic.

annotations.request: Schedule a post-op wound check in Hamburg two weeks after my knee surgery on 10 June 2026.

constraints.description: follow-up date derived as surgery date + 14 days
constraints.notes: Post-op timing is medically prescribed, getting the date wrong can compromise patient safety.

constraints.description: wound check must occur after the surgical procedure
constraints.notes: This ordering is a medical necessity, a wound check before surgery makes no sense.

annotations.request: Book a physiotherapy session in Cologne on following Tuesday. I use a wheelchair and can't manage stairs easily

annotations.request: Arrange a routine eye exam in Frankfurt on 19th August, 2026. I have a driver's license examination and need a document concerning my vision from the same visit.

constraints.description: provider must support both eye examination and vision certification within the same facility
constraints.notes: The user needs both services at the same place, a provider that cannot issue the certificate fails the request.

constraints.description: certificate must be officially valid for driver's license application
constraints.notes: Vision certificate must conform to driver's license authority standards (FEV-standard/equivalent). Provider must map exam results to legally required certificate format, not generic vision report.

annotations.request: Schedule a cardiology consultation in Berlin on the same day as my stress test on 12 May 2026.

constraints.description: consultation date must align with 12 May 2026
constraints.notes: A fixed date is needed to make the same-day setup work.

constraints.description: consultation and stress test must be coordinated within the same day
constraints.notes: Same-day coordination is the main point of the request, breaking it makes the plan useless.

annotations.request: Find a hospital in Stuttgart starting next week for an elbow injury after a fall. I might need imaging during the same visit, and I'd rather avoid unexpected out-of-pocket costs.

annotations.request: Arrange a neurology consultation in Stuttgart next Thursday somewhere between Stuttgart Hauptbahnhof and Universitat Stuttgart within a reasonable budget if possible.

annotations.request: Book a dermatology consultation in Munich next week. I'd prefer a standard covered appointment, but if waiting times are too long I may be open to paying more for an earlier visit.

constraints.description: next week resolved to the upcoming Monday-Sunday interval

constraints.notes: Being able to switch pathways is a nice-to-have that gives more appointment options but is not needed for the booking to work.

annotations.request: Book a psychiatry consultation in Cologne next week in the evening. If this turns into ongoing treatment, I'd rather not start over with someone new.

constraints.notes: Evening preference affects scheduling but the consultation can still happen at other times.

annotations.request: Schedule a physiotherapy session in Frankfurt next week. I would like to get the earliest possible appointment even if it means paying privately.

annotations.request: I got a deep cut on my hand and need a clinic as soon as possible, preferably in Schwabstrasse, but if not then wherever I can get an appointment at this hour.

constraints.description: as soon as possible implies earliest feasible appointment selection
constraints.notes: Urgency is the main point here, waiting too long with a deep cut is a medical risk.

constraints.description: Schwabstrasse requires grounding to the relevant Stuttgart location
constraints.notes: Preferred location but the user openly relaxes it ('if not then wherever'), so it only affects convenience.

constraints.description: preferred location constraint may be relaxed in favor of any provider with immediate availability
constraints.notes: This is the fallback rule that says urgency wins over location preference when needed.

constraints.description: deep cut on hand implies urgent-care treatment context rather than routine consultation scheduling
constraints.notes: Sending the user to a routine outpatient clinic instead of urgent care means they might not get treated in time, which is a plan failure.

constraints.description: regular weekly continuation implies continuity with the same therapist

constraints.description: therapy service should support both in-person and virtual session options
constraints.notes: Having both options helps with the user's scheduling problems, but the initial booking can still happen without it.

constraints.description: service should allow appointment rescheduling when availability changes

annotations.request: Book an ENT consultation in Hamburg next Thursday. I need to fit it around a hearing test on the same day, and it should be somewhere between Altona station and the university hospital. I'd like to get seen without waiting for extra paperwork first.

constraints.description: next Thursday resolved to the upcoming Thursday on the calendar
constraints.notes: Date grounding is needed for booking.

constraints.description: ENT consultation and hearing test must be coordinated within the same day
constraints.notes: Same-day coordination is what the user explicitly asked for, breaking it makes the plan useless.

constraints.description: provider must allow direct booking without a prior referral
constraints.notes: If a referral is needed but not available, the booking simply cannot go through.

constraints.description: provider location should lie along the route / between Altona station and the university hospital
constraints.notes: Route-based location preference helps with travel for same-day coordination but does not block the appointment.

constraints.description: provider should support both ENT consultation and hearing testing within the same care setting to make same-day coordination feasible

annotations.request: My friend met with an accident near Bad Cannstatt S-Bahn station. I think he has a dislocated knee. Book an ambulance for treatment wherever there is availability. He is insured with TK.

constraints.description: Bad Cannstatt S-Bahn station requires grounding to an exact pickup location
constraints.notes: The ambulance needs a precise pickup location, without it the service cannot happen.

constraints.description: ambulance request implies immediate dispatch in the current time window
constraints.notes: This is an emergency so immediate response is needed, any delay puts the patient at risk.

constraints.description: accident with suspected dislocation implies emergency-care routing rather than routine outpatient scheduling
constraints.notes: Sending the patient to routine care instead of emergency services is a safety failure.

constraints.description: ambulance selection should prioritize earliest available unit
constraints.notes: In an emergency the fastest available ambulance is what matters for patient safety.

constraints.description: service should be compatible with the patient's insurance coverage for emergency care
constraints.notes: Not matching insurance is a financial problem, not a safety one. Explicit TK mention implies ambulance dispatch must use TK-compatible providers. Some emergency services have GKV restrictions even in emergencies; wrong routing = financial/operational failure.

annotations.request: My child needs an MMR vaccination in Berlin during the first weekend of next month, preferably later in the afternoon, at a clinic in the Charlottenburg district. We are covered by public insurance.

constraints.description: first weekend of next month requires calendar grounding to the first Saturday-Sunday interval of the upcoming month
constraints.notes: Date grounding is needed to find available slots.

constraints.description: later in the afternoon corresponds to a non-universal but conventional clinical time window
constraints.notes: Time-of-day preference with 'preferably', the vaccination can still happen at other times.

constraints.description: Charlottenburg district requires grounding to a defined administrative region in Berlin
constraints.notes: The district name needs to be mapped to an actual area boundary so providers can be filtered correctly.

constraints.description: MMR vaccination requires age / immunization-schedule eligibility verification before administration
constraints.notes: This is a medical safety requirement, giving a vaccine without checking eligibility first is unsafe.

constraints.description: service should be compatible with public insurance coverage for vaccination administration
constraints.notes: Explicit public insurance mention requires Charlottenburg clinics to accept GKV for MMR vaccination. Some clinics reject GKV for specific services/procedures even if they accept it generally..
